_meta.description: Golden test suite for the Excel/XLSX intent runtime pipeline (English). Each case exercises the full pipeline: message -> segment -> match patterns -> fill slots -> assemble plan. Cases reference intent patterns from intent_patterns/excel.en.any.json and validate that the correct operator plan is assembled.

cases._comment: ========== NEGATIVE TESTS (SHOULD NOT MATCH ANY EXCEL INTENT) ==========
cases.input: What is the meaning of revenue?

expected.reason: General knowledge question, not an editing command

cases.input: Thanks for your help

expected.reason: Conversational response, not an editing command

cases.input: What does section 3 say about expenses?

expected.reason: Document reading question, not an Excel editing command

cases.input: Send an email to John about the quarterly report

expected.reason: Email action, not an Excel editing command

cases.input: Can you explain how VLOOKUP works?

expected.reason: Help/educational question about a function, not an editing command
